hero_desc:
The next-generation messenger with end-to-end encryption, AI assistant,
HD video calls and a built-in cryptocurrency token — all in one app.
f1_desc: Instant encrypted messaging with groups, media, and files.
f2_desc: Built-in AI chat powered by advanced language models, available anytime.
f3_desc: Crystal-clear audio and video calls via WebRTC — no intermediaries.
f4_desc: Create communities, channels, and group chats with flexible permissions.
f5_desc: All messages and calls protected end-to-end. Your data stays yours.
f6_desc: Earn crypto by using the network. Premium features, rewards, staking.
earn1_desc: Sign up and get 50 EION tokens instantly as a welcome bonus.
earn2_desc: Provide disk space for distributed network data and earn continuously.
earn3_desc: Run an EION network node and receive regular token rewards.
earn4_desc: Participate in transaction confirmation and earn validator rewards.

faq.a: EION is a decentralized messenger with built-in cryptocurrency, AI assistant, and HD video calls. It combines secure communication with a Web3 economy.
Yes, the basic version is completely free. Premium features are available for 500 EION/month or 4200 EION/year.

faq.q: How do I get EION tokens?
faq.a: You receive 50 EION upon registration. You can also earn by providing network storage, running a node, or validating transactions.
The server and website code are available on GitHub. The app source code will be partially opened as the project develops.

faq.q: On which platforms is EION available?
faq.a: Currently available for Android and Linux. iOS and Windows versions are in development.
